title: お夜食ちゃんこの効能

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono has the day off today, and I'm
working in my office. Or I should be, but I keep
dozing off.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: ...All done! ♪ Mm... It looks sooo tasty! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A mouth-watering aroma tickles my nose and
wakes me up. Its comforting scent reminds me of
a storybook scene of a happy family sitting
together.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello, Trainer! ☆ You were out like a light.
choice_data_list: Akebono... What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'm here with a late-night pick-me-up for you! It's
chanko! Thanks for working so hard for my sake!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do indeed see chanko right in front of me, but
as grateful as I am for her thoughtfulness, I can't
help but wonder...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Well, I wanted you to eat your fill without
worrying about anything, but since it's so late...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I thought you wouldn't want to have anything
that's too rich and heavy, so I made two kinds of
chanko!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You can choose between a meaty miso chanko
full of dreams and a lighter chanko with a salt
broth that's full of veggies!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Which one sounds good to you? I'll warm up the
other for the girls at the dorm, so choose
whichever you like.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The salted chanko would definitely be nourishing.
The miso chanko might sit a bit more heavily, but
it would be more energizing. I think I'll pick...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yaaay! ♪ That's a great choice! You've gotta fuel
up after such long hours!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I put almost two kilograms of meat in it, but I can
add more if it's not enough! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead and eat your fill so we can both train at
our best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono's love comes through with every
bite, and we finish the entire pot together!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
All right, sure thing! Veggies are definitely what
you need right now, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I made this while channeling aaall my hopes that
it'll be nice and nourishing, so I'm sure this'll perk
you right up! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
We should eat it before it gets cold! Give me a
moment to ladle it out for us!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
These mushrooms are actually really rare. An old
lady shared them with me after I carried her out
of the forest after she got lost, and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I listen to her talk, the chanko sends warmth
and energy throughout my body. Tomorrow is
going to be a great day—I just know it.
